mission.title: netdata: Click House monitoring
mission.description: Click House monitoring. Requested by 27+ users.

steps.title: Check current netdata setup
steps.description:
Verify your netdata version and configuration:
```bash
netdata version
```
This feature requires a working netdata installation.

steps.title: Review netdata configuration
steps.description:
Review the relevant netdata configuration:
We are willing to support monitoring ***[Click House](https://clickhouse.yandex/)*** with netdata.

steps.title: Apply the fix for Click House monitoring
steps.description:
##### Summary

Collector for ClickHouse database

##### Test Plan

Tested with local database

##### Additional Information

This is an initial version. The selection of metrics could be improved and some metrics could be grouped together. New commits and feedback are welcome!

Implements #4813

See the fix PR for details: linked PR

steps.title: Upgrade netdata to include the fix
steps.description:
If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade netdata:
```bash
# Check current version
netdata version
# Follow the project's upgrade guide at https://github.com/netdata/netdata
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected.
Confirm the feature described in "Click House monitoring" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
##### Summary

Collector for ClickHouse database

##### Test Plan

Tested with local database

##### Additional Information

This is an initial version. The selection of metrics could be improved and some metrics could be grouped together. New commits and feedback are welcome!

Implements #4813

prerequisites.description: A working netdata installation or development environment.
